shared_asset_bindings.name: short sword and long spear reference

fight_director.fight_intent: establish the unequal battlefield and pressure direction
combatants: hero lower right wounded but standing
enemy higher left with long spear
fight_director.tactical_objective: show that the hero must cross distance under spear pressure
fight_director.opponent_counter_pressure: enemy owns the higher stairs and keeps spear reach pointed downward
fight_director.spatial_map: rain courtyard, hero screen right lower level, enemy screen left upper stairs, pillars and wet floor as anchors
action_chain: wide layout reveals distance
enemy spear points down
hero shifts weight forward
fight_director.result_state: viewer understands left-right axis and vertical disadvantage before the charge
fight_director.readability_plan: silent viewer can read who is higher, who is pressured, and where movement must go

combat_beat.screen_action: enemy holds upper-left space while hero prepares at lower-right edge
combat_beat.tactical_meaning: the shot defines the problem before action begins
combat_beat.anticipation: rain falls through the empty distance between them
combat_beat.contact_or_collision: no contact yet; spear line threatens the center lane
combat_beat.impact_feedback: pressure is shown by spear shadow and hero's compressed stance
combat_beat.reaction: hero narrows stance and watches the spear tip
combat_beat.aftermath: the distance line is set for the next approach
combat_beat.continuity_out: hero remains lower right, enemy remains upper left

impact_system.pre_impact: empty rain distance and spear shadow create threat
impact_system.contact_frame: no physical contact in this layout shot
impact_system.recoil: none yet, only clothing moved by rain wind
impact_system.sound_hint: distant rain and low tension only
impact_system.aftermath_pose: hero low right ready to move, enemy high left controlling lane

vfx_power.visibility_rule: VFX must support action readability, not hide contact frame

camera_coverage.lens_feel: wide depth with stairs and wet floor
camera_coverage.screen_direction: future hero movement goes right to left and upward
camera_coverage.subject_priority: battlefield relation first, spear threat second, hero readiness third
camera_coverage.continuity_to_next: next shot starts with hero charging from lower right toward upper left

provider_route_strategy.first_frame_plan: wide layout frame with hero low right and enemy high left
provider_route_strategy.end_frame_plan: hero leaning forward from lower right
provider_route_strategy.prompt_compression_rule: show spatial relation and pressure, no combat contact yet

key_poses: enemy holds dominant high line
hero stays low in opposite screen side
rain and floor reflections reveal distance
weapon line points across the gap
hero shifts weight toward first move
extra readable key pose for tempo density
action_events: layout reveals both combatants and route
enemy pressure line narrows the safe path
combat_tempo.force_feedback: rain, weapon angle, and body crouch show pressure before contact
combat_tempo.major_traversal_window: extended duration is justified by environment reveal, power reveal, aftermath, or readable hold
combat_tempo.speed_curve: held pressure, small weight shift, ready-to-burst ending; front-load at least 60% of events before 70% of duration, then hold reaction or landing

shots.prompt_canonical_en: 3D guoman cinematic rain courtyard layout, enemy high left with spear pressure, hero low right preparing to cross the wet stone distance.
shots.provider_execution_prompt: Wide low-angle rain courtyard at night. Hero stands lower on screen right in a compressed stance, enemy spear guardian is higher on screen left at the stairs, spear tip aimed down across the center lane. Wet stone floor and broken pillars show distance and depth. Slow locked push only, no contact yet; end as the hero leans forward to charge. No gore, no teleporting, no subtitles, no UI.

qc_evidence.action_readability: The shot is a clean layout with no overloaded action.
qc_evidence.tactical_clarity: The hero's problem is crossing upward under spear pressure.
qc_evidence.contact_believability: No contact is attempted, so the shot avoids fake contact.
qc_evidence.impact_feedback: Pressure is visualized by spear shadow and compressed stance.
qc_evidence.spatial_continuity: Left/right and vertical levels are clearly assigned.
qc_evidence.vfx_readability: Rain and reflections do not obscure the fighters.
qc_evidence.style_consistency: The shot uses 3D guoman depth, rain, and stone courtyard scale.
qc_evidence.cutability: The forward lean gives a clean cut into the charge.

fight_director.fight_intent: show the hero choosing a low inside route
fight_director.tactical_objective: enter under the spear line without losing the established axis
fight_director.opponent_counter_pressure: enemy lowers the spear to intercept the charge
fight_director.spatial_map: hero travels right to left along wet floor, enemy stays high left, camera keeps the same side
action_chain: hero pushes off puddle
cloak snaps backward
enemy lowers spear
hero ducks under the spear line
fight_director.result_state: hero reaches the inside lane near the spear shaft
fight_director.readability_plan: movement direction remains right to left and enemy does not teleport

combat_beat.screen_action: hero charges low and slips under the descending spear path
combat_beat.tactical_meaning: the hero sacrifices height to get inside weapon reach
combat_beat.anticipation: puddle ripples as the hero pushes off
combat_beat.contact_or_collision: near-miss under the spear line, no weapon contact yet
combat_beat.impact_feedback: cloak and rain trail show speed without hiding body
combat_beat.reaction: enemy begins to pull spear inward to recover
combat_beat.aftermath: hero arrives close enough for the next clash
combat_beat.continuity_out: hero is now near center-right below the spear shaft

impact_system.pre_impact: hero compresses then pushes from the puddle
impact_system.contact_frame: spear passes just above hero shoulder as near-miss
impact_system.hitstop: no hitstop, only a readable near-miss beat
impact_system.environment_feedback: puddle splash and rain streaks show speed
impact_system.aftermath_pose: hero crouched inside the spear reach

vfx_power.visibility_rule: VFX must support action readability, not hide contact frame

camera_coverage.lens_feel: wide enough for body and spear
camera_coverage.screen_direction: hero continues right to left toward enemy
camera_coverage.subject_priority: hero route first, spear near-miss second, enemy recovery third
camera_coverage.cut_point: cut as hero reaches the spear shaft
camera_coverage.continuity_from_previous: inherits hero lower right leaning forward
camera_coverage.continuity_to_next: next shot begins with hero under the spear line at center

provider_route_strategy.first_frame_plan: hero starts lower right after layout
provider_route_strategy.end_frame_plan: hero crouched under spear near center
provider_route_strategy.prompt_compression_rule: one approach, one near-miss, one inside-lane result

key_poses: push-off from original mark with shoulders forward
explosive acceleration crosses half the frame early
abrupt low weight drop under the weapon line
side slip with cloak and rain trailing behind
short blade knocks the weapon aside
inside-line landing ready for next contact
action_events: instant dash covers the distance before midpoint
low dodge changes the attack line
weapon deflection opens the inside line
combat_tempo.force_feedback: weapon deflection and wet floor skid show force transfer
combat_tempo.major_traversal_window: major traversal, if present, completes within the first 20-40% and before midpoint
combat_tempo.speed_curve: slow threat beat, violent forward burst, quick dodge, brief contact hitstop, sharp landing; front-load at least 60% of events before 70% of duration, then hold reaction or landing

shots.prompt_canonical_en: Hero charges low from lower right to center, ducking under the enemy spear line in the same rain courtyard axis.
shots.provider_execution_prompt: Low tracking side shot in the same rain courtyard. Hero pushes off from a puddle at lower screen right and charges right-to-left, cloak snapping back. Enemy remains upper left and lowers the spear to intercept. The spear passes just above the hero's shoulder as a clear near-miss; hero ducks under and ends crouched inside the spear reach near center. One approach, one near-miss, one result. No teleporting, no extra clash, no subtitles, no full-screen blur.

qc_evidence.action_readability: One approach route and one near-miss are visible.
qc_evidence.tactical_clarity: Hero moves low to enter inside spear reach.
qc_evidence.contact_believability: The shot uses near-miss instead of fake contact.
qc_evidence.impact_feedback: Puddle splash and cloak snap show speed.
qc_evidence.spatial_continuity: Hero continues right-to-left from the layout.
qc_evidence.vfx_readability: Rain streaks do not hide the body route.
qc_evidence.style_consistency: Low tracking and wet courtyard keep 3D guoman style.
qc_evidence.cutability: End pose sets up center-frame weapon clash.

fight_director.fight_intent: Floor seal presses downward and enemy bends into half-kneel
fight_director.opponent_counter_pressure: enemy resists through spear pressure, height, armor weight, and recovery timing
fight_director.spatial_map: same rain courtyard axis, hero remains center-right/right-to-left, enemy remains screen left near stairs
action_chain: inherit previous state
Floor seal presses downward and enemy bends into half-kneel
end with aftermath starts with enemy pinned in floor seal
fight_director.result_state: aftermath starts with enemy pinned in floor seal
fight_director.readability_plan: show one action purpose, one contact or reaction, one stable result for silent autoplay

combat_beat.screen_action: Floor seal presses downward and enemy bends into half-kneel
combat_beat.tactical_meaning: this beat advances the fight from avatar reveal from shot 6 toward aftermath starts with enemy pinned in floor seal
combat_beat.anticipation: brief hold from previous continuity state before movement
combat_beat.contact_or_collision: visible contact, reaction, or force boundary appropriate to suppression_field
combat_beat.impact_feedback: rain spray, weapon vibration, floor glow, debris, or posture change marks feedback
combat_beat.reaction: enemy reaction occurs after the contact or pressure cue
combat_beat.aftermath: end state is stable and readable for the next shot
combat_beat.camera_logic: camera prioritizes suppression_field and avoids hiding contact
combat_beat.vfx_logic: VFX supports readability and stays attached to source/contact/floor
combat_beat.continuity_out: aftermath starts with enemy pinned in floor seal

impact_system.pre_impact: inherits avatar reveal from shot 6 with a short readable hold
impact_system.contact_frame: clear frame for Floor seal presses downward and enemy bends into half-kneel
impact_system.recoil: weapon, cloth, armor, or posture reacts after the beat
impact_system.environment_feedback: wet floor, rain spray, sparks, dust, floor seal, or settling debris responds
impact_system.aftermath_pose: aftermath starts with enemy pinned in floor seal

vfx_power.source: weapon contact or hero seal depending on beat
vfx_power.shape_language: gold floor geometry, rain spray, sparks, and clean silhouettes
vfx_power.motion_behavior: appears at source, peaks briefly, then clears contact area
vfx_power.interaction_with_body: cloth, armor, and posture respond without hiding faces
vfx_power.interaction_with_environment: wet floor, debris, rain, and light reflections react
vfx_power.visibility_rule: VFX must support action readability, not hide contact frame
vfx_power.peak_state: Floor seal presses downward and enemy bends into half-kneel
vfx_power.end_state: aftermath starts with enemy pinned in floor seal

camera_coverage.lens_feel: wide enough for body and spear
camera_coverage.camera_motion: locked or slight tracking, never full orbit during contact
camera_coverage.screen_direction: preserve hero right-to-left pressure and enemy left-side position
camera_coverage.subject_priority: suppression_field first, continuity second, VFX third
camera_coverage.cut_point: cut after aftermath starts with enemy pinned in floor seal
camera_coverage.continuity_to_next: aftermath starts with enemy pinned in floor seal

provider_route_strategy.end_frame_plan: aftermath starts with enemy pinned in floor seal
provider_route_strategy.prompt_compression_rule: one approach, one near-miss, one inside-lane result

key_poses: pre-contact guard set
weapon or limb enters the contact line
clear collision pose with readable overlap
brief hitstop at the contact point
recoil through shoulders and cloth
end pose preserves the next cut direction
action_events: guard meets the weapon or strike
combat_tempo.force_feedback: hitstop, sparks or rain spray, and body recoil reveal force transfer
combat_tempo.major_traversal_window: short traversal or weapon entry resolves before contact; contact and reaction fill the back half
combat_tempo.speed_curve: anticipation, burst into contact, held impact frame, recoil, controlled end pose; front-load at least 60% of events before 70% of duration, then hold reaction or landing

shots.prompt_human_readable_zh: ?7??Floor seal presses downward and enemy bends into half-kneel?
shots.prompt_canonical_en: 3D guoman rain courtyard shot 7: Floor seal presses downward and enemy bends into half-kneel. Preserve the same left-right axis and readable contact/reaction.
shots.provider_execution_prompt: 3D guoman cinematic rain courtyard. Floor seal presses downward and enemy bends into half-kneel. Preserve continuity from previous shot: avatar reveal from shot 6. Keep hero center-right or moving right-to-left and enemy on screen left near the stairs. Show one readable contact, reaction, or pressure cue, then end with aftermath starts with enemy pinned in floor seal. Use one controlled camera behavior, clear wet-floor feedback, no teleporting, no gore, no subtitles, no VFX covering the contact frame.
